articles.title: Local Community Garden Expands
articles.description: A neighborhood garden project added new plots and volunteer programs this weekend.

articles.title: City Introduces New Public Bus Routes
articles.description: Transportation officials launched two new bus lines to improve access across the city.

articles.title: Technology Fair Showcases Student Innovations
articles.description: Students presented robotics, health-tech, and sustainability projects at the annual fair.

articles.title: Farmers Market Season Opens Downtown
articles.description: Local producers opened the spring market featuring fresh vegetables, dairy, and baked goods.
